headline: Assessing Garmin (GRMN) Valuation After Record Q4 Results And New Capital Return Plans
summary: Garmin (GRMN) is back in focus after its latest Q4 report highlighted record revenue across all segments, a 17% dividend increase, and a new US$500 million share repurchase program that sharpened investor attention on the stock. See our latest analysis for Garmin. At a share price of US$251.18, Garmin has seen a 21.39% 1 month share price return and a 24.29% 3 month share price return, while its 1 year total shareholder return is 13.54%. This indicates that momentum has recently picked up...

headline: How Investors Are Reacting To Garmin (GRMN) Q4 Beat, Dividend Hike And New Buyback Plan
summary: In recent weeks, Garmin reported strong Q4 results with record revenue growth across all segments, a 17% dividend increase, and a new US$500 million share repurchase program, while also launching the Garmin Community Champions initiative to spotlight local running leaders in its Marathon Series cities. Together, these moves highlight Garmin’s focus on pairing financial strength with deeper engagement in fitness communities, reinforcing the brand’s position at the intersection of performance...
